DP.532.0000:
I’ve traveled a long way to make my
beloved Pokémon even more beautiful.\f
That will make it love me even more.
DP.532.0001:
Nothing is too good for my Pokémon.
There’s no mountain too high to climb.\r
That’s how I look at it.
DP.532.0002:
I’m kind of stuck here...
They tell me there’s no shop here!\f
How am I supposed to get ready for
the road?
DP.532.0003:
You know how you can dig up cool
stuff underground?\f
People are saying they’re digging up
new, different stuff.
DP.532.0004:
I spend a lot of time in the pool.\f
Will I melt into the water the way
VAPOREON can?
